𝗧𝗜𝗠𝗘𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗜𝗭𝗘 | To provide users with a private, self-hosted platform for archiving and visualizing all their digital data and memories in a chronological timeline.  🔥 Super Hot!

✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐹 Go 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide users with a private, self-hosted platform for archiving and visualizing all their digital data and memories in a chronological timeline.
📅 Created: Aug 2024 • Updated: Jul 2026

✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Data aggregation from diverse sources (photos, videos, chats, social media, location, contacts)
✅ Self-hosted and user-owned data storage
✅ Timeline visualization of imported data
✅ 3D map view with historical location data
✅ Entity recognition and management (people, pets, organizations)
✅ Custom file picker for data import
✅ Data import from computers, phones, and online accounts


✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 3.6K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 120 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 50 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Timelinize is a self-hosted application that aggregates data from various sources like photos, chats, social media, and location history into a single, cohesive timeline on your own computer. It allows for deep data import and organization, enabling users to own and preserve their digital memories forever.

✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/timelinize/timelinize

𝗞𝗜𝗟𝗟-𝗔𝗜-𝗦𝗟𝗢𝗣 | To help developers and designers identify and eliminate common, often unintentional, AI-generated design patterns and copy tics in their web projects, leading to cleaner, more human-like products.  🔥 Super Hot!

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To help developers and designers identify and eliminate common, often unintentional, AI-generated design patterns and copy tics in their web projects, leading to cleaner, more human-like products.
📅 Created: Jul 2026 • Updated: Jul 2026

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Multilingual field guide website cataloging 33 AI-slop tells
✅ Interactive before→after demos for each tell
✅ Agent Skill (`kill-ai-slop`) to scan projects for AI-generated code signals
✅ Proposes or applies code-level fixes for detected tells
✅ Scanner can be run directly via command line
✅ Supports custom rules and path exclusions
✅ Uses `deslop-ignore` comment directives to suppress false positives


⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 606 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 22 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 0 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Kill AI Slop is a project that identifies and helps remove common visual and copy design 'tics' often found in AI-generated products. It offers a multilingual website cataloging these tells with interactive demos and an Agent Skill that scans codebases to detect and suggest fixes for these AI-generated patterns.

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/yetone/kill-ai-slop

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

𝗣𝗢𝗖𝗞𝗘𝗧_𝗗𝗜𝗦𝗔𝗦𝗠 | Enabling coding agents and LLMs to perform parallel, headless binary analysis on multiple files simultaneously using IDA Pro's IDALib, managed through a unified MCP endpoint.  🔥 Super Hot!

◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Enabling coding agents and LLMs to perform parallel, headless binary analysis on multiple files simultaneously using IDA Pro's IDALib, managed through a unified MCP endpoint.
📅 Created: Jul 2026 • Updated: Jul 2026

◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Single MCP endpoint for multiple IDALib sessions
✅ True multi-session analysis with independent IDALib processes
✅ Parallel agent workflows for simultaneous binary analysis
✅ IDA Pro MCP compatibility via pinned ida-pro-mcp
✅ Agent-managed sessions for opening and switching binaries
✅ Built-in integrations for coding agents and IDEs
✅ No IDA GUI automation required
✅ Persistent diagnostics logging
✅ Self-update support


◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐ 25 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 1 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 0 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Pocket Disasm is a Python-based control layer for headless binary analysis using IDA Pro's MCP toolset. It allows coding agents to manage multiple, isolated IDALib sessions concurrently through a single HTTP endpoint, without requiring interactive IDA GUI instances.

◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/whoisqwerz/pocket_disasm

✅ Production-ready project templates

✅ Extensible plugin system for Cursor AI skills
✅ Support for various stacks including FastAPI, React, PostgreSQL, Redis, Docker, and Kubernetes
✅ Rapid full-stack development (approx. 20 seconds)

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Cursor Kit for AI is a scaffolding library that provides production-ready project templates and plugins for developers using Cursor AI. It enables the rapid creation of full-stack applications, bots, and DevOps solutions with a single CLI command, significantly accelerating development.

𝗛𝗛-𝗔𝗜-𝗔𝗚𝗘𝗡𝗧 | Automating the job application process on HH.ru by leveraging AI for intelligent filtering and personalized cover letter generation.  📈 Growing!

✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Automating the job application process on HH.ru by leveraging AI for intelligent filtering and personalized cover letter generation.
📅 Created: Jul 2026 • Updated: Jul 2026

✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Automated job searching and application on HH.ru
✅ Intelligent filtering of job postings using LLM
✅ Personalized cover letter generation
✅ Cloudflare and HH.ru anti-blocking measures
✅ Telegram integration for notifications and HR message forwarding
✅ Local LLM (Llama 3) integration
✅ Playwright for browser automation


✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐ 74 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 11 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 0 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

This Python repository automates the job application process on HH.ru by using an AI agent to find relevant job postings, filter out unsuitable ones, and generate personalized cover letters. It integrates with Telegram for notifications and HR responses, and uses a local LLM (Llama 3) for intelligent filtering and writing.
